{"society_power": 8.5, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "CPE protests and EU treaty rejection: society checks state", "reasoning": "Vigorous protest capacity (CPE reversal, 2005 EU referendum, anti-FN mobilization) offset the decline of mass mediating institutions, keeping society strong; euro/ECB and banlieue limits eroded state autonomy while la\u00efcit\u00e9 assertion and 2008 crisis intervention pushed the other way, netting near-zero change on both axes."}
